project.name: BLADE Admin Portal
project.description:
Unified admin shell. Owns the top bar, left-rail navigation, and content area; loads each admin app (Configurator, Flow, Explorer, JSON Forms, Logs, Tuning, Files, CRUD Editor, Watcher) into the content area based on a customer-editable manifest. Replaces the retired blade/admin/console iframe shell.
Carries a small JAX-RS surface at /api/* that queries the AdminServer's DomainRuntime MBean tree to tell the shell which admin apps are currently deployed and ACTIVE. The shell intersects that with manifest.json so only present apps appear.
